value.displayName: Viremia caused by severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (disorder)

text.paragraph: Patient denies recent history of fever or malaise. Positive For weakness and shortness of breath. One episode of melena. No recent headaches. Positive for osteoarthritis in hips, knees and hands.
Chief Complaint (the patient's own description): Headache and rash
Reason for Visit (as documented by provider): Headache, rash, and fever
